statements.sql: DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX); DECLARE @target NVARCHAR(128); DECLARE @src NVARCHAR(128);
statements.rationale: Variable declarations for dynamic SQL construction. Skip as operational setup.
Variable assignments that configure the dynamic SQL. Skip as operational setup.

statements.sql: SET @sql = 'INSERT INTO ' + @target + ' (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName) ' + 'SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName ' + 'FROM ' + @src;
statements.rationale: Constructs the INSERT statement string that will write to silver.ExecConcatTarget from bronze.Product. This is the core transformation logic.
Executes the constructed INSERT statement. This is the primary write operation to silver.ExecConcatTarget.
